y=#Q return M(w)end,function(b,X)local M=T(X)local Y=function(Y)return y(b,{Y},X,M)end return Y end,-820716+820716,function(b,X)local M=T(X)local Y=function(...)return y(b,{...},X,M)end return Y end return(e(992975+7081652,{}))(M(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[X(-41662+38329)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
